text: I think it was an animation of a picture book. Although it seems like a high tier meme, it’s about people giving in to greed, and their whole life falling apart because of it. The children find an idol, and realize the idol can make transform insects into jewels, feathers and inc, so they kill a bunch of the farm animals to attract more flies, the idol transforms all of the flies, and the children have a fortune. The children go to sell the inc and feathers, but the idol finds their jewel stash and transforms everything back into insects. The children go back to the farm, and are killed by all of the insects. They were consumed by their greed.

text: It's a reference to 1950's "picture word books" that taught children English vocabulary. This film is made up of images the artist (Run Wrake) found in an envelope in a second-hand store. The illustrations were by Geoffrey Higham, drawn for J. Noel's "Early Word Picture Dictionary". http://runwrake.com/portfolio_page/rabbit/

text:
Future shorts-- get some. Because after you watch this...you'll need a fresh pair.
